title: Profile

fields.name: Poora naam
fields.workingCityHint: Jahan aap zyada duties lete ho — paas ki rides dikhane ke liye.

logout.title: Log out karein?
logout.body: Nayi ride leads dekhne ke liye dobara sign-in karna hoga.

stats.tapHint: Edit karne ke liye kisi stat par tap karo

about.title: Baare mein
about.empty: Ek chhota bio add karo taaki drivers aapki posts par bharosa karein.

support: Madad chahiye? Support se contact karo

dp.caption: Photo badlein · Profile photo
dp.required: Duty post karne ke liye profile photo zaroori hai
dp.tooBig: Photo 5 MB se kam honi chahiye
dp.badType: JPG, PNG ya WebP image use karo

completeness.title: Duty post karne ke liye apni profile poori karo
completeness.body: Apni photo aur details add karo taaki drivers aapki posts par bharosa karein.

perms.title: App permissions
perms.sub: Control kya EaseCab access kar sakta hai
perms.locationSub: Jahan aap gaadi chalate ho, wahan ki nearby rides dikhao
perms.pushSub: Nayi matching rides ke alerts pao
perms.batterySub: Background alerts time par aane do
perms.hint: Aap inhe kabhi bhi apni phone settings me badal sakte ho

deleteAccount.sub: Apni profile aur data hamesha ke liye hatao
deleteAccount.title: Apna account delete karein?
deleteAccount.body: Aapki profile aur posts hat jaayengi. 30 din ke andar dobara sign-in karke sab kuch wapas pa sakte ho; uske baad hamesha ke liye delete ho jaayega.
deleteAccount.error: Aapka account delete nahi ho saka. Phir try karo.

error.load: Aapki profile load nahi ho saki.
error.save: Save nahi ho saka. Phir try karo.

poster.title: Profile
poster.error: Yeh profile load nahi ho saki.

report.title: Is driver ko report karo
report.reasonQ: Aap inhe kyun report kar rahe ho?
report.attachError: Attach nahi hua. Choti image try karo.
report.submittedSub: Shukriya — hamari team is driver ko review karegi.
report.already: Aap is driver ko pehle hi report kar chuke ho.
report.error: Bhej nahi sake. Phir try karo.
report.errorSelf: Aap apni hi profile report nahi kar sakte.
report.errorRate: Aaj aapne bahut saare drivers report kar diye hain. Baad mein try karo.
report.errorGone: Ye driver ab available nahi hai.
report.errorNetwork: Connection nahi hai. Internet check karke dobara try karo.

blocked.title: Blocked users
blocked.emptyHint: Jinhe aap chat se block karte ho woh yahan dikhenge.
